claim_boundary: admitted SQL local-source expression/operator correctness evidence only; not ANSI SQL, production semantic parity, or performance evidence
fallback_boundary: external engines may be isolated test oracles or baselines only and are not invoked by this validator
remaining_matrix_gaps: correlated multi-column and nested subquery semantics
general fuzz execution beyond the deterministic seeded property lane

rows.null_policy: null_propagating_for_arithmetic_operands; null_amount_not_selected_by_predicate
rows.coercion_policy: integer arithmetic over admitted numeric columns and finite literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid numeric expressions return deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.claim_boundary: seeded property lane for scoped SQL local-source numeric expression projections only

rows.null_policy: TRY_CAST returns NULL for invalid scalar values
rows.coercion_policy: explicit TRY_CAST(column AS int64) only; no silent lossy coercion
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid scalar input becomes NULL under TRY_CAST and strict CAST invalid inputs block
rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL local-source TRY_CAST projection only

rows.null_policy: string transforms and length preserve scalar-row NULL propagation where admitted
rows.coercion_policy: UTF-8 source columns only; non-UTF8 operands block deterministically
rows.invalid_input_behavior: missing or non-UTF8 string operands return deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.claim_boundary: scoped LOWER/UPPER/TRIM/LENGTH projection semantics only

rows.null_policy: temporal extract returns NULL for NULL temporal operands where admitted
rows.coercion_policy: explicit cast to date32/timestamp_micros plus scoped ISO UTC timestamp parsing
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid date/time literals and unsupported timestamp forms block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped Date32 and UTC timestamp extract projection semantics only

rows.null_policy: COALESCE uses matching non-null fallback; NULLIF returns NULL on matching sentinel
rows.coercion_policy: source/fallback and source/sentinel dtypes must match after binding
rows.invalid_input_behavior: mismatched fallback or sentinel dtype returns deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.claim_boundary: scoped COALESCE and NULLIF projection semantics only

rows.null_policy: SQL three-valued comparison projection plus IS NULL and IS NOT TRUE/FALSE behavior
rows.coercion_policy: admitted scalar comparisons over bound source columns and DATE literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: missing source columns and unsupported predicate shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL predicate projection semantics only

rows.null_policy: HAVING evaluates SQL WHERE-style truth over aggregate output rows; non-true or NULL predicate results are filtered out
rows.coercion_policy: HAVING columns must bind to aggregate output aliases or selected group keys
rows.invalid_input_behavior: HAVING over non-aggregate rows or non-output source columns returns deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL local-source aggregate HAVING over emitted aggregate output rows only

rows.null_policy: composed UTF-8 string functions propagate NULL operands where admitted
rows.coercion_policy: UTF-8 source columns and scalar UTF-8/int literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported string function shapes return deterministic diagnostics
rows.claim_boundary: scoped CONCAT/SUBSTR/LEFT/RIGHT/REPLACE SQL local-source semantics only

rows.null_policy: temporal arithmetic and differences propagate NULL temporal operands
rows.coercion_policy: explicit casts plus scoped ISO Date32 and UTC timestamp_micros parsing only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid dates, non-UTC timestamps, and out-of-range intervals block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped UTC date/timestamp arithmetic and difference projections only

rows.null_policy: CASE predicates use SQL truth where NULL selects ELSE
rows.coercion_policy: THEN and ELSE branch dtypes must match after source-column binding
rows.invalid_input_behavior: mixed branch dtypes and unsupported predicate leaves block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped CASE WHEN computed projection semantics only

rows.null_policy: IN lists containing NULL use SQL three-valued WHERE filtering
rows.coercion_policy: literal list values must match the source column dtype or NULL
rows.invalid_input_behavior: empty lists, dangling commas, and oversized lists block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped literal IN predicate NULL semantics only

rows.null_policy: materialized IN subquery values containing NULL use SQL three-valued WHERE filtering
rows.coercion_policy: single-column scalar subquery values must match the left operand dtype
rows.invalid_input_behavior: missing subquery columns and oversized materialized lists block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped scalar IN subquery predicate semantics only

rows.null_policy: COUNT(DISTINCT column) ignores NULL values while count(*) includes rows
rows.coercion_policy: COUNT(DISTINCT <column>) only; other DISTINCT aggregate functions are unsupported
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported DISTINCT aggregate shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped grouped COUNT(DISTINCT) aggregate semantics only

rows.null_policy: hidden HAVING aggregates evaluate over aggregate rows and filter non-true predicates
rows.coercion_policy: HAVING aggregate functions must be admitted aggregate functions over grouped source rows
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported HAVING aggregate shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped hidden aggregate functions in HAVING expressions only

rows.null_policy: window offset functions produce NULL when the requested peer row is absent
rows.coercion_policy: scoped partition/order columns and positive NTILE/LAG offsets only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported window frames, zero offsets, and invalid bucket counts block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped mixed window row_number/rank/lag/ntile semantics only

rows.null_policy: inner equi joins emit matched non-null key rows only for this scoped fixture
rows.coercion_policy: qualified same-dtype equi join keys plus admitted WHERE predicate leaves only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: ambiguous aliases, duplicate-key explosions, and unsupported ON shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped multi-key inner equi join plus WHERE predicate semantics only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: division by zero is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: numeric arithmetic projection division by zero is not admitted
rows.claim_boundary: blocked unsupported numeric arithmetic shape only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: decimal128 cast target is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: decimal precision/scale casts are not admitted by the current scalar semantics profile
rows.claim_boundary: blocked unsupported cast target only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: UTC timestamp_micros literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.claim_boundary: blocked non-UTC/offset timestamp literal only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: timezone database conversion is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: timezone database and non-UTC timestamp semantics are not admitted
rows.claim_boundary: blocked timezone database conversion only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: ANSI interval literals are not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: ANSI INTERVAL literals and interval arithmetic are not admitted
rows.claim_boundary: blocked interval literal/arithmetic only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: regex pattern semantics are not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: regex and regexp pattern semantics are not admitted
rows.claim_boundary: blocked regex predicate only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: locale-aware collation is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: SQL COLLATE and locale-aware collation semantics are not admitted
rows.claim_boundary: blocked locale/collation comparison only
